prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次183名、2026年大幅扩招45%（竞争缓解推后位次）、学校Top5层次（位次波动受限）、抖音高热关注度（报考热度不减）等因素。扩招是位次后移的主要驱动因素，但复旦品牌效应和吉林省考生规模稳定起到缓冲作用。预测2026年理科最低位次约232名，区间182–282名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for science/physics category were approximately 221 → 194 → 174 → 157 → 183. From 2021 to 2024, there was a year-on-year forward trend (decreasing ranking numbers), but in 2025, the ranking moved back by about 26 places compared to 2024, showing a correction. The 5-year average is about 186, and the 2025 baseline ranking is about 183. The enrollment plan for science/physics category in Jilin Province: 2021: 25, 2022: 27, 2023: 25, 2024: 19, 2025: 20. The 2026 plan increases to 29, an expansion of 9 students (+45%) compared to 2025, which is a significant expansion, easing competition and putting upward pressure on ranking numbers.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Fudan University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Ranking, it ranks 5th (consistently in the top 5 nationally for many years), making it a top-tier comprehensive university with inherently limited ranking fluctuation. In 2026, reputation evaluation is somewhat negative (involving teacher ethics and school management incidents), but in 2025, reputation was positive (research achievements honors). Douyin popularity ranking: 4th (high heat), with comprehensive heat of about 10.74 million, extremely high short video exposure, and sustained high application attention. Historical abnormal admission signal: In 2022, the science admission score in Henan Province plummeted (medium attention), but this is a cross-province phenomenon with limited impact on Jilin Province. Fudan University has 11 A+ disciplines (Mathematics, Physics, Chemistry, Biology, Chinese History, Chinese Language and Literature, Philosophy, Political Science, Journalism and Communication, Theoretical Economics, Marxist Theory, etc.), and over 25 A-level and above disciplines, with top-tier academic strength, strongly attracting high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer Science, Electronics/Communication are high-heat recommended majors; Clinical Medicine is a recommended major; Law, Finance/Economics are differentiated and under observation. The total number of Jilin Province Gaokao examinees in 2026 is about 110,868, roughly flat compared to 2025 (about 111,492), with a stable competition landscape. Fudan University is located in Shanghai (first-tier city), which has strong regional appeal to Jilin candidates. The university's enrollment scale in Jilin Province is small (20-29 students), making it a small-quota province in cross-provincial admissions, and rankings are sensitive to single-year plan changes.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the 2025 baseline ranking of 183, the significant 45% enrollment expansion in 2026 (easing competition, pushing rankings back), the university's top-5 level (limiting ranking fluctuation), and high Douyin attention (sustained application heat). The expansion is the main driver for ranking backshift, but Fudan's brand effect and stable Jilin candidate numbers act as buffers. It is predicted that the 2026 science minimum ranking will be about 232, with a range of 182–282.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for liberal arts/history category were approximately 102nd → 109th → 103rd → 115th. Overall, it fluctuated within the 100-115 range, with 115th in 2025 being the highest (most backward ranking) in recent years. The average over the past 4 years is about 107th, and the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 115th. The enrollment plan for liberal arts/history category in Jilin Province: 25 in 2021, 25 in 2022, 25 in 2024, 25 in 2025; in 2026, the plan drops to 18, a reduction of 7 (-28%) compared to 2025. The reduction is significant, intensifying competition and putting upward pressure on rankings.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Fudan University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. It ranks 5th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, making it a top-tier comprehensive university in China with a strong liberal arts foundation (Chinese Language and Literature A+, History A+, Philosophy A+, Journalism and Communication A+, etc.), extremely high level. In 2026, reputation evaluation is slightly negative, but in 2025 it was slightly positive. Douyin popularity ranks 4th (high heat), with comprehensive heat about 10.74 million, indicating sustained high application attention. In historical admission anomaly signals, Fudan University has experienced fluctuations in admission lines in provinces like Henan, but rankings in Jilin Province itself are relatively stable. Fudan's liberal arts advantages are prominent: Chinese Language and Literature A+, Chinese History A+, Philosophy A+, Journalism and Communication A+, Political Science A+, Theoretical Economics A+, Law A-, Foreign Language and Literature A-, etc., making it highly attractive to top liberal arts candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law is in a wait-and-see state of differentiation (fierce competition but high threshold), Journalism and Communication is clearly discouraged (high employment pressure), Finance/Finance and Economics/Economics is in a wait-and-see state of differentiation (requires school level support). The total number of candidates for the 2026 Gaokao in Jilin Province is about 110,868, with an estimated history category of about 31,043 based on historical proportions, roughly flat compared to 2025 (31,071). Fudan University is located in Shanghai, which has strong regional appeal to top liberal arts students in Jilin Province. The university's liberal arts enrollment in Jilin Province is small (18-25 people), and the 28% reduction in 2026 has a relatively sensitive impact on rankings.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 115th, the significant 28% reduction in enrollment in 2026 (intensifying competition pushing rankings forward), the university's Top 5 level and top-tier liberal arts disciplines, and high Douyin attention. The reduction is the main driver for ranking advancement, but Fudan's liberal arts rankings in Jilin Province have long been stable around 100th, with limited room for fluctuation. It is predicted that the minimum ranking for liberal arts in 2026 will be about 96th, with a range of 46-146.
